title: Lines Sent To Alexander Mclaughlan, Amaranth Station, With A Copy Of My Poems
content:
We send to you these rugged rhymes
            In memory of the olden times,
            Great chief of our poetic clan,
            Admired by all, McLaughlan.
meaning:
"Lines Sent To Alexander Mclaughlan, Amaranth Station, With A Copy Of My Poems" is a quintessential example of James McIntyre's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
